quality_assessment.formatting_notes: The description uses inline markdown links ('[_lightning bolt_](#lightning-bolt)', '([attunement](#section-attunement))') which are context-dependent but otherwise clear.

charges.destruction_chance: d20 roll of 1 upon expending the last charge

abilities.scaling: Each additional charge increases spell slot level by one.

mechanical_analysis.summary: A standard magic wand that casts *Lightning Bolt* with variable spell slot levels based on charges expended (minimum 3rd level). The charge mechanics (limit, recharge, and destruction on last use) are clearly defined.

llm_audit.data_archivist_notes: The data is clean, consistent with standard D&D item formatting, and mechanically sound. No Zod errors detected.
